race.comment: ICONIFY (1) resumes here having his first run for the new stable but has revved up for this with two recent trials and trust that Gollan has him up to the mark. Rates a leading contender against this line-up. Former Victorian ARCELIA (5) went down by the narrowest of margins when having her first local run and hoop Sutherland sticks in the irons. Gets the benefit of his 1.5kg claim and looms as the main danger. SPOILT ROTTEN (7) has placed two of three around this circuit and will be rock-hard fit for this. Include in calculations. ZOUSLAYER (8) put in a career-best performance last time out and may have turned the corner now. Can play a role from the low draw. LISTING CAPITAL (3) best of the rest.
